mentions.role_in_text: announced that twelve new companies have entered its Venture Lab acceleration program
mentions.occurrence_sentence: BioInnovation Institute (BII) announced that twelve new companies have entered its Venture Lab acceleration program for early-stage companies.

mentions.role_in_text: International non-profit foundation incubating and accelerating world-class life science research
mentions.occurrence_sentence: PRESS RELEASE — BioInnovation Institute (BII), an international non-profit foundation incubating and accelerating world-class life science research, announced today that twelve new companies have entered its Venture Lab acceleration program for early-stage companies.

mentions.role_in_text: Supporting start-ups and projects with funding, knowledge, network, and infrastructure.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Since its inception in 2018, BII has supported 100 start-ups and projects with EUR 89 million alongside the venture capital, industry, and business expertise it provides to help them accelerate to the next level.
